chosen_logo.why: header-img returned 403 from CDN; falling back to /favicon.svg, the next-best official asset

brand_primary.name: --color-brand-sky
brand_primary.evidence: :root token --color-brand-sky; literal hex appears 25× across all 6 pages; CTA hover state uses --color-brand-skydark #004D99

brand_secondary.name: --color-brand-night
brand_secondary.evidence: :root token --color-brand-night; deep navy used for high-contrast headers and feature backdrops

ink.name: --color-brand-stone
ink.evidence: :root token --color-brand-stone; computed body color is rgb(77,75,70) = #4D4B46 — Unilever uses warm stone instead of pure black for body text

paper.name: --color-brand-earth
paper.evidence: :root token --color-brand-earth; computed body bg is rgb(246,247,240) = #F6F7F0 across pages

accents.name: --color-brand-lilac
accents.evidence: lilac accent — used for content highlights

display_font.evidence: Custom proprietary font, computed font-family on body and h1 across all 6 pages; appears in font-family stack 61× (max in scan). Fallback chain: 'Century Gothic', 'CenturyGothic', 'AppleGothic', Roboto, sans-serif. Note: UnileverDesire is licensed — fallback to 'Century Gothic' for slide builds

body_font.evidence: Same as display; Unilever uses one display family across the site, weight differentiates display vs body

spacing_radius_shadow.evidence: Computed body padding is generous (large vertical rhythm); CTAs visible in /our-company/a have rgb(0,77,153) bg with rounded corners; no heavy drop-shadows observed in computed[box-shadow] — Unilever leans into editorial flat with breathing room

style_keywords: saturated brand-color accents on calm earth-tone canvas
precedents: Ben & Jerry's manifesto pages — minus the playfulness
aesthetic.voice_register: purpose-driven corporate; long-form sustainability narratives, leadership-quote heavy
